archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with 5 (Jewel & Luxury - Dark Tech Variant)
concept: NovaNest - A premium, Apple/Linear-inspired futuristic productivity platform. Emphasizes dark space, subtle light leaks (cyan/indigo), sharp typography, and 'tracing beam' active states. Deep obsidian base with glassmorphism to feel like a high-end tool.

typography.rule: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings tight and punchy.

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/5

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all backdrop-blur-md

cards.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative group
cards.tracing_beam: Use framer-motion or CSS masks to create a subtle glow along the border on hover.

interactive_dashboard.instruction: Build a stunning mock UI using Tailwind grid, Shadcn-like charts (Recharts), and framer-motion. Use rounded corners (16px), dense information hierarchy, and glass headers to simulate an actual app.

motion_and_interactions.cursor_glow: A fixed 400x400 radial gradient tracking mouse coordinates with a blur-3xl, opacity 10%.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_progress: A fixed top framer-motion progress bar in brand cyan.

hero_background.description: Deep dark background with subtle elegant glowing aurora light leaks
hero_background.usage: Use as an absolute positioned background behind the hero section with opacity-40 and mix-blend-screen.

abstract_accents.usage: Use for feature card backgrounds or CTA section with low opacity
Use as texture layer in pricing Pro tier

specific_instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Install 'framer-motion' for animations (cursor glow, scroll progress, page reveals).
Install 'recharts' for the Interactive Dashboard Preview section.
Do not use generic blue/purple linear gradients. Instead, build soft glowing backgrounds using radial-gradients with cyan and indigo blurred heavily behind dark glass.
For the 'Interactive Dashboard Preview', build a composite of fake UI cards (Charts, Tasks, Habit Streaks) overlapping each other or arranged in a tight Bento grid to simulate an app screenshot.
Ensure the 'Pro' tier in Pricing has a distinct glow ('box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.15)') and a subtle border gradient.
Add a custom cursor component tracking mouse movement that paints a soft glow underneath the UI elements using mix-blend-mode.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and accordion items.
Use 'Outfit' font for headings via Google Fonts import in index.css.
Make sure the navbar is sticky, blurred, and updates styling slightly on scroll if possible.
Testimonials should use the provided avatar images in a slick Framer Motion carousel or responsive grid.
